data.description: Implement GoogleCalendarAdapter with OAuth 2.0 flow. Fetch real events from primary calendar. Handle rate limiting. Save to calendar_events table. 15+ tests.
data.title: Google Calendar OAuth + Adapter

data.description: Implement AppleICalAdapter. Parse .ics files. Normalize to CalendarEvent. Merge with Google events via CalendarMerger. 10+ tests.
data.title: Apple iCal + Calendar Merge

data.description: Implement WeatherAdapter (OpenWeather) and MapsAdapter (Google Maps). Cache for 1h and 30m respectively. 20+ tests.
data.title: Weather + Maps Adapters

data.description: Replace mock Vapi with real API calls. WebSocket connection for live transcript. Call state logging. Error handling. 20+ tests.
data.title: Vapi Real Endpoint Integration

data.description: Implement ConversationAgent with real LLM calls. Generates structured plan with leave_time, workout_timing, missing_events. Depends on tasks 1-4. 20+ tests.
data.title: Conversation Agent (Claude/OpenAI LLM)

data.description: End-to-end integration. Error recovery for timeouts. Langfuse observability. Dashboard validation. 5+ integration tests.
data.title: Integration + Error Recovery

data.description: Twilio SMS adapter is currently stubbed (returns mock success). Implement real Twilio Python SDK integration. iMessage bridge is functional. Wire both into conversation_agent.send_summary() flow. Touches: twilio_sms.py, conversation_agent.py. Acceptance: Real SMS delivered via Twilio; iMessage bridge tested; user can choose channel via preferred_messaging_channel; all sends logged to debug_logs with latency.
data.title: Implement message summary delivery (Twilio + iMessage)

data.description: Calendar adapters are read-only. Add create_event() to CalendarAdapter base class and implement in GoogleCalendarAdapter and AppleICalAdapter. Conversation agent triggers event creation after user confirms. Only ADD events, no decline/delete. Touches: adapters/calendar/base.py, google_calendar.py, apple_ical.py, conversation_agent.py. Acceptance: Agent can create events in both Google Calendar and Apple iCal; confirmation flow before write; mutations logged to debug_logs.
data.title: Add calendar event creation (voice-triggered write)

data.description: Planning agent should: (1) if user has a work event, plan commute to work; (2) else find next in-person event and plan commute there; (3) if next event is virtual, tell user no commute needed. Detect virtual events by location field or platform tags (Zoom, Meet, Teams). Touches: agents/planning_agent.py, adapters/maps.py, agents/state.py. Acceptance: Correct commute recommendation based on day type; virtual event detection works; departure time includes buffer.
data.title: Smart commute planning (work vs in-person vs virtual)

data.description: Add first_event_buffer_minutes to user_preferences table (default 60). Planning agent reads this preference and calculates: wake_time = first_event_time - commute_minutes - buffer_minutes. Include buffer rationale in plan summary and voice call. Edge case: alert user if buffer + commute exceeds available time. Touches: migrations/, agents/state.py, agents/planning_agent.py. Acceptance: Preference persisted in DB; wake-up time recommendation accounts for buffer; voice agent mentions buffer.
data.title: Pre-event buffer user preference

data.description: Conversation agent should be able to fetch real-time weather during the call when user asks. Weather adapter is already complete. Add a weather tool definition to the LangGraph agent, wire into conversation_agent.py. Cache results within session. Natural language responses. Touches: agents/conversation_agent.py, adapters/weather.py. Acceptance: Agent responds to weather questions mid-call; correct location used; results cached; API calls logged with latency; graceful error handling.
data.title: On-demand weather lookup tool for conversation agent

data.description: 6 AM call may be blocked by iPhone Sleep Focus or DND. Configure Vapi call with max priority settings. Implement retry with backoff if call fails. Send SMS fallback after N failed attempts. Add call priority config and retry count to settings. Touches: adapters/voice/vapi.py, conversation_agent.py. Acceptance: Calls configured with highest urgency; retry logic implemented; SMS fallback triggered after failures; delivery status logged.
data.title: Vapi call delivery through iPhone sleep/DND modes

data.description: Current prompts say 'DailyOps AI' but Vapi assistant is named Max. Prompts are functional but robotic. Update: (1) rename DailyOps AI → Max in all prompts; (2) add warm, friendly, personable tone guide; (3) use user's name naturally; (4) add empathy/humor for schedule context; (5) natural transitions. Touches: agents/prompts.py, adapters/voice/dailyops_prompt.py. Acceptance: Agent greets user warmly; uses first name; tone feels conversational not corporate; tested across light/heavy schedule scenarios.
data.title: Max persona warmth — update prompts and Vapi assistant config

data.description: Investigate and implement Luma integration for real-time event suggestions during the daily call. Currently tabled because Luma has no public API for events hosted by others. When API becomes available: fetch local events, present 2-3 suggestions mid-call, ask 2-3 follow-up questions based on user answer (e.g. event type preference → filter by category). Touches: adapters/events/luma_adapter.py (new), conversation_agent.py. Acceptance: Agent surfaces relevant local events during call; follow-up questions narrow suggestions; results logged.
data.title: Luma event suggestions during voice call (tabled — no public API)

data.description: Max should have full context of all calendar events for the present day (00:00–23:59 ET), including events that have already finished. This gives Max awareness of what the user did earlier in the day, not just what's upcoming. Awareness window is strictly 1 day — no events from yesterday or tomorrow bleed in. Implementation: planning agent fetches all events for current calendar day in ET timezone (midnight to midnight); includes past events in AgentState with a 'completed' flag or similar marker; conversation agent receives full day context; Max can reference earlier events naturally ('You had a standup this morning — how did that go?'). Touches: agents/planning_agent.py, agents/state.py, adapters/calendar/google_calendar.py, adapters/calendar/apple_ical.py. Acceptance: All same-day events (past + upcoming) included in AgentState; timezone anchor is ET (America/New_York); no cross-day bleed; past events distinguishable from upcoming ones; Max can reference earlier events in conversation.
data.title: Max full-day calendar context with 1-day awareness window

data.description: Add a tool to the conversation agent that fetches full calendar context for any date the user asks about during the call. Example: 'What do I have on Friday?' or 'What's on my calendar next Monday?' — Max fetches and summarizes that day's events on demand. Distinct from DOPS-15 (which covers the fixed present-day context loaded at call start). Tool accepts a date parameter (relative: 'tomorrow', 'next Friday'; or absolute: 'July 4th'). Fetches from both Google Calendar and Apple iCal adapters. Returns normalized CalendarEvent list for that date. Caches result within the session to avoid repeat API calls for the same date. Touches: agents/conversation_agent.py, adapters/calendar/google_calendar.py, adapters/calendar/apple_ical.py, agents/state.py. Acceptance: Tool available to Max during call; handles relative and absolute date references; fetches from both calendar sources; caches per-date within session; results logged to debug_logs with date queried and event count; graceful handling if no events found.
data.title: On-demand calendar context fetch for a specified date
